name: Telemetry Spans Complete
description: Every required governance-semantic telemetry span (capability invocations, tool calls, guard evaluations, approval events) must be recorded.
rationale: FIX Gap 3 / DecisionPathID substrate. Telemetry that is absent or cannot be reconstructed is a Red halt: the execution trajectory cannot be audited.

examples.fails: a required span missing from the trajectory record

source: FIX AI WG — Proposal on Agentic AI Runtime Governance (Healey & Houston, 12 Jun 2026); governance conditions per Szpruch, Sudjianto, Bhatti & Ang (2026), 'Scalable Runtime Governance for Agentic AI in Financial Services'.
